description: Fixed command manifest for the W0.3 generic ARM64 guest smoke test. This file is the single, reviewable source of truth for WHAT the smoke test checks. render_seed.py compiles it into the cloud-init user-data runner; parse_transcript.py verifies the captured serial transcript against it. Changing this file changes the smoke test, and is reviewable in version control.

commands.description: Kernel and architecture banner; proves a running ARM64 Linux kernel.
Machine hardware name; must be exactly aarch64 (the ARM64 assertion).
Guest identity; confirms the pinned generic Alpine guest booted.
Shell execution context; a usable root shell answered.
CPU count visible to the guest under TCG SMP.
Active clocksource; the ARM generic timer is present and selected.
Literal echo; proves the shell runs our exact command and returns its output over the serial console.

shutdown.description: Clean power-off must be observed on the serial console AND QEMU must exit on its own (guest-initiated PSCI SYSTEM_OFF), not via the harness timeout.
